channel.title: Scandinavian Journal of Pain
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Scandinavian Journal of Pain

item.title: Exploring the complexities of chronic pain: The ICEPAIN study on prevalence, lifestyle factors, and quality of life in a general population
item.description: Article by Henrik Grelz, Ulf Jakobsson, Patrik Midlöv, Marcelo Rivano Fischer, Åsa Ringqvist DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sjpain-2024-0056

item.title: The effect of peer group management intervention on chronic pain intensity, number of areas of pain, and pain self-efficacy
item.description: Article by Henrik Grelz, Ulf Jakobsson, Patrik Midlöv, Marcelo Rivano Fischer, Åsa Ringqvist DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sjpain-2024-0018

item.title: Association between clinical laboratory indicators and WOMAC scores in Qatar Biobank participants: The impact of testosterone and fibrinogen on pain, stiffness, and functional limitation
item.description: Article by Henrik Grelz, Ulf Jakobsson, Patrik Midlöv, Marcelo Rivano Fischer, Åsa Ringqvist DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sjpain-2024-0045

item.title: Effectiveness of non-invasive vagus nerve stimulation vs heart rate variability biofeedback interventions for chronic pain conditions: A systematic review
item.description: Article by Henrik Grelz, Ulf Jakobsson, Patrik Midlöv, Marcelo Rivano Fischer, Åsa Ringqvist DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sjpain-2024-0037

item.title: A scoping review of the effectiveness of underwater treadmill exercise in clinical trials of chronic pain
item.description: Article by Henrik Grelz, Ulf Jakobsson, Patrik Midlöv, Marcelo Rivano Fischer, Åsa Ringqvist DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sjpain-2024-0051

item.title: Knowledge, attitudes, and practices of transcutaneous electrical nerve stimulation in perioperative care: A Swedish web-based survey
item.description: Article by Henrik Grelz, Ulf Jakobsson, Patrik Midlöv, Marcelo Rivano Fischer, Åsa Ringqvist DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sjpain-2024-0078

item.title: Stellate ganglion block in disparate treatment-resistant mental health disorders: A case series
item.description: Article by Henrik Grelz, Ulf Jakobsson, Patrik Midlöv, Marcelo Rivano Fischer, Åsa Ringqvist DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sjpain-2024-0071

item.title: Corrigendum to “Patient characteristics in relation to opioid exposure in a chronic non-cancer pain population”
item.description: Article by Henrik Grelz, Ulf Jakobsson, Patrik Midlöv, Marcelo Rivano Fischer, Åsa Ringqvist DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/sjpain-2024-9997
